title: Soulbound: Online
description:
Fight Together. Die Together. Loot Forever.Soulbound is a pixel-art action-MMO where every dungeon run reshapes your build. Charge into roguelite dungeons with friends in 3-player co-op, chain devastating ability combos from 100+ combinations, and return to a living open world where you farm, craft, and uncover a mystery that runs deeper than any dungeon floor.

A New Take On The MMO: Where Every Dungeon Run Is DifferentSoulbound splits its world in two: a shared overworld full of quests and adventure, and brutal instanced dungeons that never play the same way twice. Every floor reshuffles encounters, hazards, and loot and every room unlocks new relics that warp your abilities in ways you didn't plan for. This is a one of a kind MMO-meets-roguelite hybrid that fuses our favourite meta progression systems with the chaos of survivor-like combat.

100+ Ability and Relic Combos To Build OutEnter the dungeon and pick from 10+ abilities that create unique class builds with branching relic paths. Stack a chain-lightning relic on your mage's Pyrosphere and watch mobs evaporate. Layer life-steal onto a berserker's hammer and turn your AoE into a heal for your party. Every relic run offers new synergies you've never tried, and the best builds are the ones nobody planned.

As you swap your gear, you swap your class instantly. Tank for your friends on Monday, rain bullets on Thursday, your character is every class you want it to be, whenever you want it to be.

 
 

Explore A Huge, Shared Open World With Friends Step out of the dungeon and the pace shifts. Soulbound's open world is a shared space where thousands of players farm, gather, trade, and quest side by side. Tend your crops, fish a quiet river or stumble into a quest line that unlocks an ability you didn't know existed. The overworld is where you discover the skills and upgrades that make your next dungeon run deadly.

Every life skill feeds back into your progression with cooking restoring stamina, gathering unlocking crafting materials for gear and buffs and mining unlocking crafting stations to build the weapons that defines your class. 

Customise Your Character With Hundreds of Gear Pieces and Thousands of LooksGear in Soulbound does two things: makes you powerful and makes you you. Separate cosmetic slots mean your stats never dictate your style as you collect handmade, uniquely animated pixel-art armor sets, rare cosmetic drops, and companion pets. Mix and match freely and make your character look exactly how you want.

Build Your Home, Tend To Your Farm and Level Up Your StationsEvery player gets their own base, and it's where your meta progression lives. Inside it, you construct and upgrade stations that unlock new gear tiers, potions that tip dungeon runs in your favor, and meals that push your stamina further. Decorate every room with furniture, trophies, and a full room-layout editor. Invite your friends and start building your guild base.

Something Is Wrong With This Lore Rich WorldYou awaken inside a digital universe that feels alive… but hostile. Early in your journey, you encounter The Anima, enigmatic and malevolent entities that overwhelm you with impossible force. Death isn’t the end, however. You’re recovered by a robotic rescuer and brought to your Virelda, a safe haven, workshop, and base of operations. As a Pioneer, you’ve got a lot to do before you can stand against The Anima.

Key Features• MMO × Roguelite hybrid: Persistent character progression meets instanced dungeons.

• 10+ distinct ability classes with branching relic paths (100+ unique build combos per run).

• Classless character progression, try a new build anytime.

• 3-player co-op dungeons and 5+ player raids.

• Handmade pixel-art world.

• Deep crafting ecosystem, grow crops, upgrade stations, cook food, forge gear, brew potions.

• Full player housing that you can build, upgrade, and decorate with a room-layout editor.

• Separate cosmetic system with hundreds of gear pieces and cosmetic slots.

• Mystery-driven narrative, uncover the truth behind the Anima through environmental storytelling.

• Built for long-term play with live events, seasonal content content, new dungeon tiers, and expanding world zones. 

Wishlist now and get notified when the game enters Early-Access!
description_short: Soulbound is a pixel-art action roguelite with an MMORPG overworld. Run fast-paced bullet-heaven dungeons solo or in 3-player co-op, raid bosses, craft gear from your loot, and build out your personal base. Join thousands of players in the quest to explore, trade, and build a new world.
